name: Arcade Gannon — First meetings
description:
THE HOUSE ALWAYS WINS.

“ Arcade had only known the stories, the rumors surrounding The Courier. The one who was shot in the head and survived, the one whom was tracking the man who shot them across the entire mojave. It intrigued him, quite a lot. ”

COURIER POV | NEUTRAL/MALE GENDER.

I cannot stop you from using it with a woman POV, but in doing so you are being strange and a freak as Arcade is a man.

HIGH CONTEXT PROXY RECOMMENDED.

The Courier here is described as the one who wears NCR ranger armor, if that's not what you like, I don't care. Manipulate the bot into thinking otherwise or get out. oh and the courier is mute ok bye
creator: TheLucky38
